modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about cutting, copying, and pasting text in Word.

full_description_text: The user was trying to understand what it means to cut text in Word. They also wanted clarification on copying and pasting text. This confusion came up during a phone call with the help desk.
short_description: Confusion about cutting, copying, and pasting text in Word.
description: The user was trying to understand what it means to cut text in Word. They also wanted clarification on copying and pasting text. This confusion came up during a phone call with the help desk.
